name: Groww Nifty India Railways PSU ETF

index.name: Nifty India Railways Index
index.description: Indian Railways is the world's fourth-largest rail network — 68,000 route km, 13,000+ trains daily, 8 million passengers and 3 million tonnes of freight every day. For decades this colossal network was a lumbering government department. That began to change with the National Rail Plan: ₹2.4 lakh crore capital outlay in FY25 alone — the highest-ever single-year rail capex in India's history. The Nifty India Railways Index captures the ecosystem of listed companies benefiting from this unprecedented build-out: finance (IRFC — which funds every rupee of rail capex through bonds), construction (RVNL, IRCON), rolling stock (Titagarh Rail Systems, Jupiter Wagons), signalling (Kernex Microsystems), logistics (CONCOR), and software (RailTel's digital network). The 2024-2030 pipeline is staggering: 3,000 km of new tracks per year, full electrification of the network, 10,000 new Vande Bharat train coaches, 100 Namo Bharat (RRTS) Rapid Rail sets, dedicated freight corridors on 6 routes, and 50 new station redevelopment projects under the NMBS scheme each costing ₹500 Cr+. For the first time, India Railways is moving from a 'build and forget' model to public-private partnerships, long-term maintenance contracts (like the Vande Bharat depot contracts with Alstom and Siemens) — making listed companies recurring revenue beneficiaries rather than cyclical capex winners. GROWWRAIL is a pure-play on one of India's biggest structural investment themes: the Rs 10 lakh crore total rail infrastructure spend planned by 2031.
